# URLSessionTaskMetrics.ResourceFetchType.serverPush

**Case**

The resource was pushed by the server to the client.

## Declaration

```swift
case serverPush
```

## Fetch types

- **URLSessionTaskMetrics.ResourceFetchType.unknown**: The manner in which the resource was fetched could not be determined.
- **URLSessionTaskMetrics.ResourceFetchType.networkLoad**: The resource was loaded over the network.
- **URLSessionTaskMetrics.ResourceFetchType.localCache**: The resource was retrieved from the local storage.
